latin: Reapers, machinae antiquissimae, omnem vitam in galaxia delere constituerant. Shepard omnibus dixit: 'si nunc non pugnavimus, nemo post nos pugnabit.' species alienae, olim inimicae, tandem se coniunxerunt.

questions.prompt: What do the Reapers want to do?
questions.target: Destroy all life in the galaxy
choices: Destroy all life in the galaxy

questions.prompt: What happens to the alien species?

translation: The Reapers, the most ancient machines, had decided to destroy all life in the galaxy. Shepard told everyone: 'If we do not fight now, no one will fight after us.' Alien species, once enemies, finally joined together.
